ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance test */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the performance test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the performance test was conducted */,
  "test_config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test configuration used */,
  "test_phase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test phase */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the test */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the test was last updated */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., pending, running, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_tests_test_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_config_id") REFERENCES test_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_tests_test_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_phase_id") REFERENCES test_phases ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the test configuration */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the test configuration */,
  "concurrency_level" INTEGER /* Concurrency level (e.g., 4, 8, 16, 32, 64) */,
  "test_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the test (e.g., 1 hour) */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of test configuration (e.g., load, stress, performance) */,
  "config_parameters" TEXT /* Additional parameters for the test configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test phase */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the test phase */,
  "phase_description" TEXT /* Description of the test phase */,
  "phase_order" INTEGER /* Order of the test phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "platform_description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "platform_type" TEXT /* Type of platform (e.g., web, mobile, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance test */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency in seconds */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Throughput in requests per second */,
  "error_rate" REAL /* Error rate as a percentage */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the test result (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance test being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the test */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance test */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_notes_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance test */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the test file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_files_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance test */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_metrics_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_metrics_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance test */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_versions_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance test */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_tags_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance test */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_comments_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
